title: [Control Systems] Moxa security advisory (AV26-509)
description: On May 26, 2026, Moxa published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: UC-1200A/2200A/3400A/4400A/8600A/8200 Series   multiple versions and models
V1200 Series   version MIL3 v1.2.0 and prior
V3200 Series   version MIL3 v1.1 and prior
V3400 Series   version MIL3 v1.1 and prior
VM-1220 Series   version MIL3 v1.1.0 and prior
ioThinx 4530 Series   version MIL3 v2.1 and prior
AIG-302 Series   version v1.4.0 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
